title: Kensuke The Spy
wikitext:
[]: Kensuke "The Spy"             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Mar 21, 2010 6:55 pm While transferring the episode #03 commentary, I came across an old comment of mine that got me to thinking about Kensuke again. OMF: Confession: The first time I watched this episode, I though Kensuke was some kind of spy. He is, after all, the kid who knows too much.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Mar 21, 2010 7:16 pm Kensuke is obviously Hyuga's son. Also, I'd say one reason he was never chosen as an Eva pilot was because of his insatiable curiosity. I'm not sure about him knowing about class 2-A though. All the other information that he is shown to discover is directly related to his father's work, whatever that may be, where as the secret about 2-A was kept very much a secret from everyone. I very much doubt that his father had any information about it. The only possible explanation for his knowledge would be if the information was leaked by Kaji or someone else, like you said.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 21, 2010 7:26 pm I think you're right on the money. Kensuke certainly snoops through his dad's files, and he is likely someone fairly important to have that sort of information on his home computer. It's also quite likely that Kensuke has military fandom contacts prior to the evas becoming known, and in such circles surely they would have quickly become the prime focus for investigation. Hell, maybe he gets his info the same way Hyouga does?

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun Mar 21, 2010 7:27 pm Interesting Topic. Actually, Fazmotron's post didn't strike me as too far off the mark. I had been under the assumption that Kensuke was one of the Nerv techies lovechilds (perhaps even Fuyutsuki's) when I had just gotten into the start of the series. But it strikes me that Kensuke's father is probably involved in probably some mid-level administration at Nerv either regarding military defenses or information tech, considering that Kensuke has knowledge, but not complete knowledge about the Eva Units. Possible nomination would be an admin of the Matsushiro testing center, considering his explicit knowledge of the Unit 03 situation.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Mar 21, 2010 8:29 pm Fazmotron wrote: All the other information that he is shown to discover is directly related to his father's work...

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sun Mar 21, 2010 9:07 pm A Kensuke thread, I approve. I think you're on the money with this. Kensuke, I imagine, would be a pretty good hacker/snooper, he just comes across that way to me. I'm pretty sure he gets most of his information from his father. ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The thought then occurred that perhaps all the candidates are the children of senior personel, like Yui, who were selected as Eva imbuees in part due to their loyalty to SEELE. Consider Toji's father and grandfather; two generations working for Nerv, perhaps the better to keep closer ties with their benfactors? However, this is an entirely speculative notion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 21, 2010 11:08 pm For what it's worth: Kensuke trying to become an Eva pilot (IIRC, he fails in the end for various reasons) in Eva2 leads him to discovering all of Class 2-A are possible pilots (as well as eventually digging deep enough to make the Eva=mother's soul connection with Shinji and Asuka, though he doesn't tell them)...

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Mar 22, 2010 3:46 pm Interesting. That's the kind of information I'd most like to hear from Eva2. Still, the game is pretty far down the canon list as it currently stands. Just as a further question; how does Kensuke come by this information in the game?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 22, 2010 3:57 pm He has to ask people like Gendo and Fuyutsuki about the CI files whenever he runs into them, which is something of a pain in the ass to do gameplay-wise because you need to be completely alone with you and the other character... Anyway, glad this tidbit is interesting at least.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 22, 2010 4:12 pm ...and also dodging the bullets Gendo begins firing at you?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 22, 2010 4:47 pm Heh, nah, there's nothing like that. Since I somehow forgot to mention it before, I'm pretty sure you have to make Kensuke have a high relationship status with both Fuyutsuki and Gendo before they willingly answer anything (although the same can be said about another character asking other characters about the CI files).

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:50 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm pretty sure you have to make Kensuke have a high relationship status with both Fuyutsuki and Gendo

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:51 pm I can't even imagine the sort of penis-rape to canon that would have to happen for Kensuke and Gendo to have a high enough relationship where they'll get in private and spill secrets. ...and how awkward that must be for everyone involved.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:55 pm Honestly, I would just say he is a nosey teenager with computer skills.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 22, 2010 8:13 pm NemZ wrote: ...again, how is this even a remote possibility? I can't imagine a circumstance in which Kensuke would be permitted to even look at the commander without some nameless grunt helping him bend his knees the wrong way.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Mar 22, 2010 8:24 pm SSAS wrote: Honestly, I would just say he is a nosey teenager with computer skills.

[]:             Quote Post by Zephros » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:02 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Honestly, I would just say he is a nosey teenager with computer skills.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Mon Mar 22, 2010 11:29 pm See, this is why Kensuke should have been the pilot, not Touji. Kensuke's clearly a much smarter and more interesting character than we're led to believe in the show. Touji's just a stereotypical jock whose only saving grace is his love for his sister. (And I can't stand jocks, but that's besides the point.) Plus, to me, the Bardiel disaster would have had much more impact if Kensuke was the pilot of Eva-03. He always wanted to be a pilot, so giving him what he wanted and having it bite him in the ass would have oozed delicious irony. (Wow, that sounded evil of me.)

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Mar 23, 2010 12:17 pm CyberXIII wrote: See, this is why Kensuke should have been the pilot, not Touji.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Mar 23, 2010 3:06 pm Fazmotron wrote: Also, I'd say one reason he was never chosen as an Eva pilot was because of his insatiable curiosity.

OMF: Confession: The first time I watched this episode, I though Kensuke was some kind of spy. He is, after all, the kid who knows too much.
